description:
This quiz tests advanced skills in context engineering for AI systems, including managing context windows, token budgets, retrieval, prompt structure, and understanding failure modes in production environments. It starts with basic concepts but escalates in difficulty, adopting a challenging and pragmatic tone to push practitioners beyond demo-level knowledge.
Topics: context windows, token budgets, retrieval, prompt structure, failure modes, prompt caching, hybrid search
Audience: Developers and AI practitioners focused on building production-ready AI systems rather than simple demonstrations.
